appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance for agent-browser including isolation boundaries and session/data constraints.
Documented runtime concurrency downgrade to serial validator execution due low free RAM/no swap under active load.
Documented recurring Clerk sign-up blockage in headless automation due PAT/Cloudflare challenge 401 causing authenticated-flow assertions to be blocked.

orchestratorOverride.justification: 13/37 assertions passed (all public/unauth). 24 blocked by Clerk Cloudflare bot protection preventing headless sign-up. This is an environment limitation, not a code bug. Blocked assertions moved to later milestones (generation-cross-flows, conversion-cross-flows) where they will be re-attempted. Auth code verified by unit tests, typecheck, and manual code review.
